description: Style Notebata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this sandal tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this pair that's as hard wearing as it as stylish, at a reasonable price!Product DetailsSynthetic leather forefoot with an ankle strap looping around the ankleA strap from the toe connecting the forefoot and ankle strapsVelcro closures for the ankle straps Removable backstrap for floaters to be used as sandalsPatterned grooves on the rubber footbedTPU outsole with patterned groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
